title: 'Only one who escaped unhurt': Probe in murder of Suvendu's aide shifts focus to 3rd man in SUV
content: A driver, Montu Mondal, is the sole survivor of an attack that killed Chandranath Rath and Buddhadeb Bera. Mondal, who hid in the rear of the SUV, provided a detailed account of the 50-second assault to investigators. The SIT is now focusing on his testimony to reconstruct the events and identify potential surveillance.

title: War 'drones' on: From blitz to grind - is Putin's Ukraine strategy starting to crack?
content: By mid-2026, Russia's Ukraine invasion has transformed into a grinding conflict.  Ukraine's successful drone warfare and long-range strikes on Russian infrastructure are reshaping the battlefield.  Russia, adapting with infiltration tactics and glide bombs, faces a new, industrialized war of attrition.  European aid bolsters Ukraine's defense, while diplomatic progress remains stalled.

title: DRDO ready with Agni-VI: Why this next-gen ICBM matters for India’s deterrence
content: An Intercontinental Ballistic Missile, or ICBM, is a long-range missile designed to travel more than 5,000 km. Unlike cruise missiles, which fly through the atmosphere using engines throughout their journey, ballistic missiles spend much of their flight outside the atmosphere, which means the missile actually leaves Earth’s air atmosphere and travels through space for part of its journey.

title: IPL: Rashid, Shubman power Gujarat Titans to crushing 77-run win over RR
content: Gujarat Titans secured a commanding 77-run victory over Rajasthan Royals, propelled by Shubman Gill's explosive 84 and Rashid Khan's match-winning 4/33 spell. Titans posted a season-high 229/4, with Gill and Sai Sudharsan building a formidable opening stand. Royals faltered chasing the target, collapsing under Rashid's brilliance and succumbing to 152 all out.

title: ‘Bid to prevent central rule’: VCK extends outside support to Vijay govt, to stay in DMK alliance
content: VCK chief Thol Thirumavalavan has pledged unconditional support to actor-politician Vijay's government, aiming to ensure political stability and prevent President's rule in Tamil Nadu. This move, communicated to DMK chief MK Stalin, allows TVK to navigate the state's new coalition landscape. VCK will remain in the DMK-led alliance but will not join the cabinet, prioritizing political credibility over ministerial berths.

title: After 43 yrs, US family sells electrical firm for $1.7bn; gives 540 workers $240m
content: A US-based businessman, Graham Walker, gifted his 540 employees a staggering $240 million from the $1.7 billion sale of his family's company, Fibrebond Corp. This generous act, where workers received an average of $443,000, stemmed from a condition Walker imposed before the sale to power-management giant Eaton.

title: Test of advanced Agni missile with multiple warheads technology a success: Defence ministry
content: India successfully conducted a flight-trial of an advanced Agni missile equipped with a Multiple Independently Targeted Re-entry Vehicle (MIRV) system. This demonstration showcased the nation's capability to strike multiple strategic targets with a single missile, significantly enhancing defence preparedness against growing threats.

title: Delhi HC protects Shashi Tharoor's personality rights; orders blocking of deepfakes
content: The Delhi High Court granted interim relief to Congress MP Shashi Tharoor, ordering the removal of AI-generated deepfakes and synthetic media across digital platforms. The court recognized Tharoor's enforceable personality and publicity rights, barring the misappropriation of his name, image, voice, and speaking style for any commercial, political, or malicious purpose.

title: 'You have 10 working days to voluntarily recognise unions': Google UK staff tells company
content: Google's DeepMind employees are demanding union recognition amid concerns over their AI technology's use by the US and Israeli militaries. Workers seek a commitment against developing AI weapons and surveillance tools, urging management to voluntarily recognize their unions or face legal action. The move highlights growing anxieties about AI's ethical implications and its potential for harm.

title: What if Vijay had joined in 2009, Congress wonders
content: Questions arise if Congress could have achieved greater success in Tamil Nadu had actor Vijay's past interaction with Rahul Gandhi materialized into a political alliance. Now, 17 years later, a partnership is forming as Rahul Gandhi is set to attend Vijay's oath-taking ceremony, marking a significant political shift.

title: Congress struggles in Kerala for consensus as CM hopefuls push claims
content: Congress leaders Mallikarjun Kharge and Rahul Gandhi are deliberating on the next Chief Minister of Kerala. V D Satheesan, K C Venugopal, and Ramesh Chennithala are the key contenders. The party is also addressing factional protests. A decision is expected soon after consulting with party legislators and allies. The leadership aims for consensus to avoid internal discord.

title: Coinbase reports service issues, points finger at AWS cloud outage
content: A cooling issue at an Amazon Web Services data center in Northern Virginia caused widespread service disruptions. Cryptocurrency exchange Coinbase and derivatives giant CME Group were among the affected. AWS confirmed increased temperatures in a single data center impacted services. Efforts to restore cooling capacity led to extended outages for some customers. The primary issue is now resolved.

title: From 107 to 120: Inside backstage drama that delayed Vijay's grand premiere
content: For actor-turned-politician C Joseph Vijay, the days following the May 4 Tamil Nadu assembly election results were less about celebration and more about survival arithmetic. TVK emerged as the single-largest party with 108 seats in the 234-member assembly, placing Vijay within striking distance of the chief minister’s chair but still 10 short of the majority mark of 118.

title: Pak-China expert Lt Gen Subramani named next CDS; Vice Admiral Swaminathan new Navy chief
content: Lt Gen NS Raja Subramani (retd) has been appointed the new Chief of Defence Staff, tasked with implementing the theaterisation model. Vice-Admiral Krishna Swaminathan will take over as the next chief of the Indian Navy, focusing on modernization. Both appointments are effective from May 30 and May 31 respectively.

title: Mike Vrabel’s Patriots future clearer amid Dianna Russini drama
content: Mike Vrabel remains secure as head coach of the New England Patriots despite growing controversy surrounding his alleged affair with Dianna Russini. NFL insider Albert Breer claimed the organization is focused on protecting Vrabel and the team’s image. However, he warned the situation could change if more allegations or relationships emerge. The controversy has also sparked reports of tension in Vrabel’s marriage with Jen Vrabel.

title: Former NFL scout links Dianna Russini to Bill Belichick, Sean Payton
content: The Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini controversy intensified after a former NFL scout alleged that the veteran insider had relationships with several prominent NFL figures, including Bill Belichick and Sean Payton. The claims spread rapidly online following renewed attention from TMZ reports and viral social media discussions. Sports analyst Jason Whitlock also mocked the scandal publicly, calling it “The Love Bloat.” Despite the growing controversy, Patriots players reportedly continue supporting Vrabel ahead of the upcoming season.

title: Coco Gauff roasts Frances Tiafoe over Rome dinner sunglasses stun
content: Coco Gauff hilariously teased Frances Tiafoe during the 2026 Italian Open after he wore sunglasses inside a Rome restaurant. Speaking on Tennis Channel, Gauff said players laughed at Tiafoe’s fashion choice, but he confidently ignored the jokes. Tiafoe later responded on Instagram with a playful message. Both Americans are also continuing their campaigns at the Italian Open this week.

title: Indian Coast Guard commissions new-gen fast patrol vessel 'Achal'
content: The Indian Coast Guard has commissioned ICGS Achal, the fifth Adamya-class fast patrol vessel, enhancing its coastal security and offshore asset protection. Built with 60% indigenous content at Goa Shipyard Ltd for Rs 473 crore, the vessel signifies India's growing self-reliance in defence manufacturing and will undertake diverse maritime operations.

title: Koli women chart new waters, set up seafood company
content: Mumbai's Koli women are transforming their traditional fish trade into a corporate venture with Daryavardi Producer Company Limited. This community-owned enterprise, inspired by the Amul model, focuses on streamlined operations, product development, and modern marketing.  Learning about improved packaging, they aim to elevate their business from a cottage industry to a significant player in the Blue Economy.

title: How Ashish Nehra's masterstroke helped Siraj get rid of Vaibhav Sooryavanshi
content: Fifteen-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's explosive batting has instilled fear in IPL 2026 bowlers, as evidenced by Mohammed Siraj's relieved celebration after dismissing him. Sooryavanshi's fearless aggression, including hitting Siraj for a six and then attacking Rabada, put Gujarat Titans under pressure. Siraj's tactical bouncer eventually ended the teenager's impactful innings.

title: BSF fires 'in self-defence', kills 2 Bangladeshis on Tripura border
content: Two suspected Bangladeshi smugglers were killed by BSF fire along the Tripura border on Friday night. The incident occurred near Kamalasagar border outpost when a group of smugglers, allegedly aided by villagers, began pelting stones at troops after being challenged during a smuggling attempt. The deceased were identified and their bodies handed over to the Border Guard Bangladesh.

title: For 'lavish' Haj, the rich get five-star stay, multi-cuisine buffet
content: Affluent pilgrims are opting for lavish Haj packages, enjoying luxury accommodations, private transport, and gourmet multi-cuisine buffets. These premium services, including air-conditioned tents and proximity to sacred sites, come at a significant cost, sparking debate about the display of wealth during the religious journey.

title: Vatican softens towards LGBTQ+ Catholics
content: Pope Leo XIV's Vatican is signaling a nuanced approach to LGBTQ+ Catholics, embracing dialogue while maintaining traditional stances on same-sex blessings. A recent Vatican report highlighted testimonies from gay Catholics, emphasizing social justice over sexual morality. This move has drawn praise from advocates and criticism from conservatives, underscoring the ongoing internal church debate.

title: Plane with 231 flyers runs over jaywalker, engine catches fire
content: A Frontier Airlines flight bound for Los Angeles struck and killed a pedestrian who had jumped the airport's perimeter fence and was crossing the runway during takeoff. The incident sparked an engine fire, prompting the evacuation of 224 passengers and seven crew members. Minor injuries were reported among passengers, and authorities are investigating the fatal event.

title: Keir Starmer appoints former Labour PM Gordon Brown as adviser after election flop
content: Following significant local election losses, Labour leader Keir Starmer has appointed former Prime Minister Gordon Brown as a special envoy. This move comes amidst calls for Starmer's resignation from some party MPs, while voters express dissatisfaction with economic issues and immigration. Reform UK and the Greens have seen substantial gains in the polls.

title: 'Partially consumed by engine': Plane hits, kills man during takeoff at US airport
content: A shocking incident at Denver International Airport saw a Frontier Airlines jet abort takeoff after striking a person who had jumped a perimeter fence. The collision ignited a brief engine fire, prompting an emergency evacuation. While most passengers escaped unharmed, some sustained minor injuries. An investigation into the tragic event is underway.

title: Horoscope today: Astrological predictions for May 10
content: Horoscope Today: Read daily horoscope predictions for May 10, 2026. Know all about the astrological events and influences that will be affecting each of the 12 zodiac signs. Our astrologer has analyzed the movements of the planets and the alignment of the stars to bring you the most accurate and up-to-date horoscope predictions for the day ahead. Get ready to discover what the stars have in store for you today.

title: ‘There’s just one formula for success…’: Farmer’s daughter clears UPSC exam, shares winning mantra
content: Prachi Kumari, a farmer's daughter from Vidisha, achieved an impressive AIR 260 in the UPSC Civil Services Examination, becoming the Hindi medium topper. Her journey, marked by financial struggles and reliance on self-study, highlights the power of determination and continuous hard work. Prachi's success serves as a significant inspiration to aspiring civil servants across the nation.

title: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi scripts history, becomes fastest ever to...
content: Fifteen-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi became the youngest cricketer globally to hit 100 T20 sixes before turning 20. He achieved this feat during an IPL 2026 match against Gujarat Titans, needing just 514 balls, significantly faster than Kieron Pollard's previous record. This milestone highlights Sooryavanshi's fearless power-hitting and rapid rise in the sport.

title: Sonam Kapoor, Anand Ahuja announce second child's name Rudralokh with adorable pics
content: Sonam Kapoor has revealed the name of her second child, Rudralokh Kapoor Ahuja, on social media. She explained the name's spiritual significance, linking it to her elder son Vayu and the divine force of Rudra. The announcement was met with warm congratulations from fans and industry colleagues.

title: Sangakkara steps in to calm angry Jofra Archer after horror 11-ball over
content: Jofra Archer endured a disastrous opening over against Gujarat Titans, conceding 18 runs in an 11-ball spell marked by wides and a no-ball. Visibly frustrated, the pacer's struggles prompted Rajasthan Royals coach Kumar Sangakkara to intervene. The chaotic over saw Gujarat Titans openers capitalize on Archer's wayward bowling.

title: 'Own work like Mughal rulers': BJP snaps at Kejriwal over Aurangzeb jab at PM
content: A political storm erupted as Arvind Kejriwal compared PM Modi to Aurangzeb over ED raids on a Punjab minister. Union Minister Ravneet Singh Bittu retaliated, calling Kejriwal 'Ahmad Shah Abdali' and accusing the AAP of corruption. BJP leaders dismissed Kejriwal's claims, stating the ED action targets graft, not political vendetta.

title: Shubman Gill's salute to father Lakhwinder goes viral - Watch
content: Gujarat Titans captain Shubman Gill shared a heartwarming moment with his father before a sensational 84 off 44 balls. His explosive innings, alongside Sai Sudharsan's 55, powered GT to a massive 229/4 against Rajasthan Royals. Washington Sundar also contributed a crucial unbeaten 37.

title: 'Sacrifice etched in BJP's journey': PM Modi's tribute to party workers killed in Bengal
content: A temporary memorial honouring the slain BJP workers was erected near the stage at Kolkata’s Brigade Parade Ground, where Suvendu Adhikari and his council of ministers took oath earlier in the day. The memorial displayed the names of the “martyrs” along with the districts they belonged to. Shah also shared a video of the memorial and said it had evoked “deep emotions” among party workers present at the oath-taking venue.

title: Shubman Gill and Sai Sudharsan equal Virat Kohli-Chris Gayle IPL record
content: Shubman Gill and Sai Sudharsan of Gujarat Titans achieved a significant IPL milestone, registering their ninth century opening partnership. This feat equals the record held by Virat Kohli and Chris Gayle, placing them second for most century stands by any pair. The duo also matched the record for most opening wicket century stands with six.

title: No escape from the heat: Why scientists are sweating over warmer nights
content: Nights are warming faster than days globally, impacting crops, ecosystems, and human health. Cities trap heat due to concrete and lack of green cover, while rising greenhouse gases act like a thicker blanket, preventing heat escape. This 'asymmetric warming' alarms scientists, indicating a fundamental shift in the planet's ability to cool itself.

title: Why Riyan Parag is not playing for Rajasthan Royals vs Gujarat Titans
content: Yashasvi Jaiswal is captaining Rajasthan Royals for the first time in IPL 2026 against Gujarat Titans due to Riyan Parag's hamstring injury. Jaiswal won the toss and opted to bowl first, confirming Parag's expected quick return. Gujarat Titans also would have preferred to bowl, with Shubman Gill emphasizing the team's confidence in close wins.

title: T.N. government formation highlights: TVK chief Vijay to be sworn in as Chief Minister on May 10
content: Aadhav Arjuna, ‘Bussy’ Anand, Sengottaiyan among 9 TVK Ministers to be sworn in; vote of confidence in Assembly by May 13

title: Amid Sultan Palace row, tourism minister says such heritage structures will be beautified
content: Bihar’s Tourism Minister Kedar Prasad Gupta says wherever there are "such old hotels (buildings) or heritage structures, we will beautify them all"

title: TVK president Vijay to be sworn in as Chief Minister on May 10; T.N. set for coalition government
content: TVK secures support of five Congress MLAs-elect, two each from CPI, CPI(M), VCK and IUML, taking the tally to 120

title: Water conservation a challenge in Ernakulam
content: Water availability in Kochi Corpn. slips into deficit from late November to early May, finds a study conducted as part of preparing a water budget

title:
Mortality of neem trees goes up in A.P.; 
scientists blame fungus, insect attack
content: Neem trees are dying due to dieback disease caused by infection by fungus Phomopsis Azadirachtae and Tea Mosquito Bug, says Dr. YSRHU Vice-Chancellor K Dhanumjaya Rao

title: Couple arrested for possession of gutka for illegal sale near Katpadi
content: When a special team conducting surprise checks approached the shop run by Mahalakshmi, she tried to escape from the spot

title: Ministers, ambassadors, artists to join The Hindu’s Huddle in June
content: This edition will discuss topics such as role of regional parties in strengthening India’s democracy, diplomacy in times of conflict, women’s representation in Parliament, and India and China’s role in shaping a new global order

title: Aadhav Arjuna, ‘Bussy’ Anand, Sengottaiyan among 9 TVK Ministers to be sworn in with Vijay on May 10
content: As of now, there will be one representative each for women and Scheduled Castes (SC) in the Cabinet in Tamil Nadu.

title: Gram panchayat elections in Karnataka will be held before end of 2026, says Minister Priyank Kharge
content: Rural Development and Panchayat Raj Minister Priyank Kharge said the State government would conduct gram panchayat elections before the end of 2026

title: 1.65 lakh Olive Ridley turtle hatchlings released into the sea so far this nesting season, says T.N. Forest Department
content: Cuddalore emerged as a leading conservation district, with 48,617 hatchlings safely returning to the sea

title: Sheikh Hasina, Awami League congratulate Suvendu Adhikari
content: The BJP leader supported Hasina in November 2025 when the latter was sentenced to death by the International Crimes Tribunal in Dhaka for her role in the 2024 crackdown; the Awami League is banned in Bangladesh

title: Tamil Nadu government formation: TVK president Vijay to be sworn in as the Chief Minister on May 10 | A timeline of events
content: Following inconclusive Assembly elections in Tamil Nadu that led to an unprecedented hung assembly in the State, government formation was delayed amidst coalition discussions. Here is a timeline of events.

title: Karnataka Police to prioritise housing for SC/ST personnel facing caste bias in finding rented accommodation
content: The grievance committee noted that several police personnel belonging to Scheduled Castes and Scheduled Tribes were allegedly being denied rental homes on caste grounds. As a result, many were forced to live in distant areas, affecting their ability to report for duty on time

title: Massive response to The Hindu EducationPlus Career Counselling Fair-2026 in Bengaluru
content: Higher Education Minister M.C. Sudhakar suggested that career counselling could begin early, at grade 8

title: AIADMK leader Udhayakumar is hopeful of positive developments regarding his party
content: Reports indicated that the former Law Minister had conflicts with party general secretary Edappadi K. Palaniswami regarding the approach to the incoming TVK government and potential alliances with the DMK

title: Mythos | Double-edged sword
content: The Anthropic AI model can not only identify vulnerabilities in cyberspace that humans may have missed, but also generate ways to exploit them, potentially even for non-experts

title: DMK’s Periyakaruppan moves Madras HC to prevent TVK MLA from participating in vote of confidence
content: The Minister lost by just one vote to TVK’s Seenivasa Sethupathy; Justices L. Victoria Gowri and N. Senthilkumar to hold a special sitting on May 10 to hear the case

title: Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam | The star who stormed into politics
content: The political organisation built by actor-turned-politician Vijay, which emerged as the single largest party in the Assembly, declares itself as a secular movement, rooted in the Tamil experience, and committed to social justice and equality

title: CBI facilitates return of fugitive from Portugal
content: Abhay alias Abhay Rana, part of an organised crime syndicate, faces charges of attempted murder and issuing death threats

title: Actor Madhu presented with Krishnanjali Award
content: The award was presented to Mr. Madhu in recognition of his contributions to Malayalam cinema as an actor, director, producer and studio owner over a span of more than six decades

title: Delhi HC to pass interim order protecting Shashi Tharoor’s personality rights over deepfake videos
content: Justice Mini Pushkarna also issued notices to defendants in suit including social media platforms such as X and Meta, owner of Instagram

title: Suvendu Adhikari | The Bengal pivot
content: Mamata Banerjee’s former trusted lieutenant has unseated her from power and become West Bengal’s first BJP Chief Minister

title: Three-hour meeting fails to end impasse over Congress Chief Minister for Kerala
content: Deepa Dasmunsi, party general secretary in charge of Kerala, told the media after the meeting that the high command had time until May 23 to finalise the candidate; senior leaders said party chief Mallikarjun Kharge and Lok Sabha LoP Rahul Gandhi were visibly dismayed by the poster wars and public marches

title: WFI shoots down Vinesh’s comeback
content: The WFI also accused Vinesh of violating the UWW rule by competing in two weights, 50kg and 53kg trials (which was conducted by an ad-hoc committee as the WFI was not recognised by the Government then), in March 2024

title: Tamil Nadu heading for a coalition government
content: Leader of Opposition in the Lok Sabha and Congress leader Rahul Gandhi will attend Mr. Vijay’s swearing-in ceremony, in which Congress candidate P. Viswanathan will also be sworn in as a Minister

title: Census 2027: Muth becomes the first village to complete the Census self-enumeration process
content: The village in Vengurla taluka, which comprises 36 houses and a population of 144, achieved the milestone recently under the guidance of Collector Tripti Dhodmise, officials said

title: Police launch multi-city manhunt for gang suspected of murdering former IPS officer’s wife in Hyderabad
content: The gang allegedly fled Hyderabad aboard the Telangana Express from Nampally railway station shortly after the crime

title: Arrests rise to 11 in Odisha mob lynching case
content: A key eyewitness has levelled serious allegations, claiming that the assault took place in the presence of police

title: SC/ST representation beyond reserved seats still remains limited, show T.N. Assembly election results
content: Barring the AIADMK front, the other 3 fronts fielded SC/ST candidates in general constituencies. In such contests, the lone MLA elect was P. Viswanathan of the Congress, who won from Melur

title: Auto drivers seek hike in minimum fare amid rising LPG prices in Bengaluru
content: At present, the minimum auto meter fare in Bengaluru is ₹36, while passengers are charged ₹18 for every additional kilometre. The associations are now demanding that the minimum fare be increased to ₹50 and the subsequent fare to ₹25 per kilometre.

title: The Hindu’s campaigns shine at the INMA Global Media Awards
content: ‘Written By Journalists’, which highlighted The Hindu’s credible, fact-based journalism, won first place in the Best Brand Awareness Campaign category; the ‘Made of Chennai’ campaign also won an award

title: NCP(SP) leader splashed with ink by right-wing preacher
content: According to the preacher Sangram Bhandare, the act was done for the NCP(SP) functionary’s remarks made on his gurus, who are a part of the Warkari movement. In the video, Mr. Bhandare was also seen asking why he targeted the gurus and warned him not to criticise them

title: Pay attention to mental health of new mothers, say doctors
content: ‘Majority of women face post-partum depression, don’t overlook it’ doctors from Kauvery Hospital said

title: BC hostels emerge as top-performing welfare hostels in Andhra Pradesh
content: A parent feedback survey conducted through the Interactive Voice Response System has revealed a satisfaction rate of 78.20% for BC hostels

title: Parties are equal partners in INDIA alliance, says U.P. Congress chief Ajay Rai
content: ‘The SP is the largest constituent of the INDIA bloc in Uttar Pradesh and will act as the fulcrum to defeat the BJP in U.P.,’ SP spokesperson Sunil Singh Yadav ‘Sajan’ says

title: Rahul Gandhi slams Bihar govt. over police lathi-charge on teacher aspirants
content: Mr. Gandhi in an X post said that when the youth take to the streets to demand their rights, they are not given jobs in their hands; instead, lathis rain down on their backs

title: Police to step up surveillance of abandoned properties as rape attempt case renews safety fears
content: The Kochi City police have launched a mission to identify and monitor vulnerable spots that could turn into criminal shelters

title: POCSO case booked against Union Minister Bandi Sanjay’s son
content: Hours eariier Minister’s son filed a case of extortion against the girl and her family at Karimnagar Police Station; police said the complainant alleged that the incident took place during a visit to the farmhouse

title: Tamil Nadu Government Formation LIVE: Thriller Over, Sequel With Vijay As Chief Minister To Begin Today
content: Tamil Nadu Election Results 2026 Live Updates: There is buzz that the Dravidian arch-rivals DMK and AIADMK may come together after over 50 years to form a government and keep Vijay out of power.

title: "Coming To An End": Vladimir Putin On Russia's War With Ukraine
content: Russia's 2022 invasion of Ukraine triggered the most serious crisis in relations between Russia and the West since the 1962 Cuban Missile Crisis, when many people feared the world was on the brink of nuclear war.

title: 'Mamata Banerjee Not God': Bengal Minister Agnimitra Paul On Poll Results
content: Asked if the BJP should have chosen a woman chief minister, Agnimitra Paul said Suvendu Adhikari's experience in politics led to his appointment.

title: Vadai, Halwa, Coffee: What Vijay, Allies Were Served At Big Lok Bhavan Meet
content: Inside the Governor's residence, alongside coalition math and constitutional discussions, there were also trays of snacks and even video calls to family members.

title: Somnath Temple To See First-Ever Spire Kumbhabhishek Led By PM Modi
content: For the first time in its modern history, a sacred Kumbhabhishek will be conducted atop the temple's 90-meter-high Shikhar using holy water gathered from 11 prominent pilgrimage sites across the country.

title: All Aboard Hantavirus-Hit Ship 'High-Risk Contact', Must Be Monitored: WHO
content: There are nearly 150 people on board the MV Hondius at the centre of the outbreak that has killed three people, which is heading towards the waters off Tenerife.

title: Loops, Rolls, Tricolor Sky: Air Force's Suryakiran Show Set For Somnath Debut
content: The skies over the first Jyotirlinga, Somnath, are set to host a breathtaking display of aerial precision as the Indian Air Force (IAF) debuts its Suryakiran Air Show on Monday.

title: Delhi On High Alert Over Possible Terror Threat, Security Tightened: Report
content: The national capital is on high alert following intelligence inputs indicating a possible terror threat. This prompted the Delhi Police and other security agencies to intensify vigil across several sensitive locations, sources said on Saturday.

title: Guilt, DNA, And A 'Ghost': Ahmedabad Murder Cracked After 3 Decades
content: Farzana's husband, Shamshuddin Musaji Khedawala, allegedly conspired with family members to murder her following prolonged domestic disputes.

title: Mira Bhayandar Land Row: Maharashtra To Challenge High Court Order
content: The Maharashtra government has decided to challenge the recent order in the Supreme Court after the court ruled in favour of private entities in a high-stakes land dispute involving nearly 254.88 acres of prime land in Mira Bhayandar, the revenue min

title: "President's Rule Shouldn't Be Imposed": Why VCK Chose To Back Vijay
content: VCK President Thol Thirumavalavan said he had informed DMK chief MK Stalin, his ally and Vijay's political rival, before extending support to the TVK.

title: India Successfully Tests Advanced Agni Missile With Multiple Payloads
content: The Advanced Agni missile with Multiple Independently Targeted Re-Entry Vehicle (MIRV) system, capable of hitting different targets spread over a large area, was successfully flight-tested over the Indian Ocean Region, a DRDO official said on Saturda

title: Vijay's Numbers Nightmare Ends, VCK And IUML Extend Support
content: Sources told NDTV that VCK has extended its unconditional support to the TVK to form the first coalition government in Tamil Nadu.

title: Congress Launches Internal Review After Assam Poll Defeat
content: Following the Congress party's defeat in the Assam Assembly elections, Assam Pradesh Congress Committee (APCC) president Gaurav Gogoi addressed reporters in Guwahati on Saturday.

title: "AI-Generated": AMMK's TTV Dhinakaran Trashes Letter Of Support To Vijay
content: The TVK had reached out to the AMMK for the support of its lone MLA-elect Kamaraj S to stitch together a working coalition.

title: Iran FM Araghchi may visit India for Brics meet next week
content: seyed abbas araghchi is expected to visit india for the Brics foreign ministers' meeting on may 14-15 . his participation could be contingent on whether the fragile ceasefire holds . he is studying a 14-point US peace proposal which seeks an end to Iran's uranium enrichment programme for at least 12 years in exchange for the gradual lifting of sanctions .
